title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - RERA Authorities - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
